creator: jhibbits@FreeBSD.org
text: Since at least the import of ZoL/new OpenZFS, zfs has supported encrypted datasets, with password or file keys.  These can be mounted via 'zfs mount -l' or 'zfs load-key -a'.  This isn't automatically done at boot, but could be by adding the '-l' flag to the zfs mount command in the rc script.
